channel.title: Comments on: Bell’s Brewery – Oberon, Ep. 73
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: I can't stress enough what good beer Bell's is brewing! I think they are such well balanced beers, that I have yet to have one I dislike. I'm sure I won't love them all, but so far - pretty damn good stuff!!
item.content:encoded: I can’t stress enough what good beer Bell’s is brewing! I think they are such well balanced beers, that I have yet to have one I dislike. I’m sure I won’t love them all, but so far – pretty damn good stuff!!

item.title: By: Edmond M.
item.dc:creator: Edmond M.
item.description:
Not only is John the owner, he's a client too.
Bells are a great beer. Of course, can't wait for the next year release of Hopslam. Man those are tasty.
item.content:encoded:
Not only is John the owner, he’s a client too.

Bells are a great beer. Of course, can’t wait for the next year release of Hopslam. Man those are tasty.

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: John, you used the term elegance to describe 'Saaz'hops. Hmmm, not my choice especially since I am not a fan of Saaz Hops.
item.content:encoded: John, you used the term elegance to describe ‘Saaz’hops. Hmmm, not my choice especially since I am not a fan of Saaz Hops.

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
Taco Mac got these beers once they came into Georgia. This beer is pretty good and took off very well.
On a side note...It was nice to meet John Pinkerton on my way back from Jacksonville up to the North Atlanta while stopping in at the Moon River Brewery. I drank the IPA and a Slo-vannah Pale Ale. I really like the beers you guys have. Can't wait to try your Porter next time I am in town!
item.content:encoded:
Taco Mac got these beers once they came into Georgia. This beer is pretty good and took off very well.

On a side note…It was nice to meet John Pinkerton on my way back from Jacksonville up to the North Atlanta while stopping in at the Moon River Brewery. I drank the IPA and a Slo-vannah Pale Ale. I really like the beers you guys have. Can’t wait to try your Porter next time I am in town!

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Bell's rules in Michigan! I'm hoping to get to Comstock and take a tour of the brewery with some friends in the next week or two.
item.content:encoded: Bell’s rules in Michigan! I’m hoping to get to Comstock and take a tour of the brewery with some friends in the next week or two.
